mapper.select: SELECT r.room_no AS roomNo, b.bed_no AS bedNo, e.name AS elderlyName, e.age AS age, ci.check_in_date AS recordDate, ci.create_time AS recordTime FROM check_in ci LEFT JOIN elderly e ON ci.elderly_id = e.id LEFT JOIN bed b ON ci.bed_id = b.id LEFT JOIN room r ON b.room_id = r.id WHERE ci.check_in_date >= #{startDate} AND ci.check_in_date <= #{endDate} ORDER BY ci.check_in_date DESC, ci.id DESC

SELECT r.room_no AS roomNo, b.bed_no AS bedNo, e.name AS elderlyName, e.age AS age, co.check_out_date AS recordDate, co.create_time AS recordTime FROM check_out co LEFT JOIN elderly e ON co.elderly_id = e.id LEFT JOIN bed b ON co.bed_id = b.id LEFT JOIN room r ON b.room_id = r.id WHERE co.check_out_date >= #{startDate} AND co.check_out_date <= #{endDate} ORDER BY co.check_out_date DESC, co.id DESC

SELECT r.room_no AS roomNo, b.bed_no AS bedNo, e.name AS elderlyName, e.age AS age, e.check_in_date AS recordDate, e.create_time AS recordTime FROM elderly e LEFT JOIN bed b ON e.bed_id = b.id LEFT JOIN room r ON b.room_id = r.id WHERE e.check_in_date IS NOT NULL AND e.check_in_date >= #{startDate} AND e.check_in_date <= #{endDate} ORDER BY e.check_in_date DESC, e.id DESC

SELECT '-' AS roomNo, '-' AS bedNo, e.name AS elderlyName, e.age AS age, DATE(e.update_time) AS recordDate, e.update_time AS recordTime FROM elderly e WHERE e.status = 2 AND DATE(e.update_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(e.update_time) <= #{endDate} ORDER BY e.update_time DESC, e.id DESC

SELECT o.id, o.elderly_id AS elderlyId, e.name AS elderlyName, o.outing_type AS outingType, o.destination, o.start_time AS startTime, o.status FROM outing o LEFT JOIN elderly e ON o.elderly_id = e.id WHERE o.status = 0 ORDER BY ABS(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, o.start_time, NOW())) ASC LIMIT #{limit}
